description: v6 retroactive enrichment: Robot degradation was ALWAYS happening. Every sol, wheels wore, joints stiffened, batteries lost capacity, cables frayed, sensors dimmed. We just started measuring it. Based on: Spirit (2210 sols), Opportunity (5352 sols), Curiosity (4000+ sols), Perseverance (1000+ sols), ISS Canadarm2 (20+ years maintenance logs).
data_sources: Spirit/MER-A: 2210 sols operations log, wheel failure at sol 779
Opportunity/MER-B: 5352 sols, killed by global dust storm tau=10.8
Perseverance/Mars2020: 1000+ sols, 4 watchdog trips, helicopter anomalies
ISS Canadarm2: 20+ years joint maintenance data, cable replacement logs
JPL/FMEA database: 847 documented robotic failure modes on planetary surfaces
